name: create_document
description: Create a new document from a template or from scratch. You can specify recipients, pre-fill tokens and fields, attach pricing tables, and set metadata. The document will be created in draft status ready for review and sending.

parameters.name: template_uuid
parameters.description: The UUID of the template to use for creating the document. Omit to create from scratch.

parameters.name: recipients
parameters.description: List of recipients who will receive the document. Each recipient has email, first_name, last_name, and role.

parameters.name: tokens
parameters.description: Pre-filled token values to merge into the document template.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: Pre-filled field values keyed by field API name.

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Custom key-value metadata to attach to the document.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Tags to apply to the document for organization.
